description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a rectangular, boxy silhouette and a low profile. The seat and back cushions are upholstered in a warm brown fabric with a subtle, fine-textured pattern, while the base, armrests, and backrest frame are covered in a darker, almost black material that appears smooth and slightly matte. The sofa features three individual back cushions and two large seat cushions, all of which are loose and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a sturdy and contemporary appearance. The legs are short and minimally visible, suggesting a block or recessed design that keeps the sofa close to the ground. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy three-seater sofa with brown textured cushions and a dark, smooth frame. It features straight armrests, low-profile legs, and a contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three brown back cushions, two large seat cushions, and the straight, wide armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, dark backrest frame with the tops of the brown cushions visible above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and cushion thickness from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual back cushions and two large seat cushions, all loose and uniform in size, arranged in a linear configuration.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, minimally visible block or recessed legs located at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, keeping the sofa low to the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Fine, subtle textured pattern on the brown cushions; the frame is covered in a solid, smooth dark material.
